data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Protects sensitive user data from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses AES-256 and TLS protocols for secure data transmission.

data.title: Security Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring for threats and anomalies.
data.technical_spec: Employs SIEM tools for real-time threat intelligence.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.technical_spec: Utilizes rate limiting and traffic filtering techniques.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Ensures proper user authentication and role assignments.
data.technical_spec: Uses OAuth 2.0 and multifactor authentication protocols.

data.title: Secure API Gateway
data.description: Protects API endpoints from malicious activities.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with identity management systems and enforces security policies.
